title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Robin, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I don't wanna hear more about it! This is torture! Just let us go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SUMMER - I think

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then how do you know about that "Kingdom"!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every book that Ohara had gathered around the world has been...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The will of Ohara still lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That day, the world was in uproar.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Scholar Island" Ohara that was famous worldwide for its knowledge...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Got destroyed in one night with a lone girl as its survivor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "World Government" labeled them as an evil scholar group that were plotting to take over the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: About months. Later after that incident,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I went to ohara, which had become a burning field.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was an old acquaintance with the scholar leader, professor clover...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He was bright like a flower...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: You are professor Clover's friend!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was very interested in the "Void century".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've known him as an adventurer that gathered every book around the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'd been captured and imprisoned 10 times by the navy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But still, he became famous as the number one Archie-ologist in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Then he gathered every scholar in Ohara.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Then ohara became the sanctuary for archeologists.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a tragic thing for such a talented man.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I went there, I couldn't believe they even burned the tree of knowledge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I was surprised.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then when I went into the lake in the central area, I found a lot of books drowning in there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seeing that their island was on fire because of the buster call,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The scholars were trying to stop it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They died protecting the remaining "fortunes" for the future.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Saying to speak in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The clueless soldiers saw it, but they didn't realize its value.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: It was a great victory for Ohara.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: When I saw it,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My tears wouldn't stop flowing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Robin, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: :You have to escape from this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I still have things to do here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want us to be separated, Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm staying here too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Protect the books!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bring it out of the library!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: History is an "asset" for humanity

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We shouldn't give up on the future

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That you'll be living in!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
